Explanation: 
To determine how many consecutive years Vince Welch was a pit reporter, we need to look at the pit reporters listed for each year in the table:
- 2007: Dave Burns, Jamie Little, Allen Bestwick, Mike Massaro (Vince Welch not listed)
- 2008: Dave Burns, Jamie Little, Shannon Spake, Mike Massaro (Vince Welch not listed)
- 2009: Dave Burns, Jamie Little, Shannon Spake, Vince Welch (Vince Welch first appears)
- 2010: Dave Burns, Jamie Little, Jerry Punch, Vince Welch (Vince Welch listed again)
- 2011: Dave Burns, Jamie Little, Jerry Punch, Vince Welch (Vince Welch listed again)
- 2012: Dave Burns, Jamie Little, Jerry Punch, Vince Welch (Vince Welch listed again)
- 2013: Dave Burns, Jamie Little, Jerry Punch, Vince Welch (Vince Welch listed again)
From this, Vince Welch was a pit reporter consecutively from 2009 to 2013, which is 5 years. Thus, the Prediction Answer of 5 is correct.
